title: Galaxy Note 2 Hardware Buttons Are Annoying.
content: [caption id="attachment_3565" align="alignnone" width="750"] Samsung Galaxy Note 2 Hardware Buttons[/caption] So many times my finger accidentally pressed on the power button since that place is usually where I "rest my finger" when operate the device. Another thing, the volume button sits right next to the folding part of the cover. As a result, it's more difficult to operate. These are minor issues but they are annoying nonetheless.
